headline: Amphenol’s (NYSE:APH) Q1 CY2026: Beats On Revenue, Stock Soars
summary: Electrical connector manufacturer Amphenol (NYSE:APH) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 58.4% year on year to $7.62 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($8.15 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 5.1% above what analysts were expecting. Its GAAP profit of $0.72 per share was 24.4% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
